{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211325385E33501FE2A0F602D9EB"}"},"total":479},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7409293412183638808","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过最威严最不圣母 身份比较低的女子称霸小说   女主超赞 聪明 很有威严 不圣母 不在乎别人说什么 也不在意酸儒  。照这样强大威严下去 粮草一本。  加油啊  希望快更新啊  急"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725113715,"group_id":"7399966464486165529","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只是一个俗不可耐的女子........","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/e52SsDjVPogMvYa2VE/84=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/c657848e64cf4373b190b33c799fd20c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623065&x-signature=iA5hs80rJRkPGN%2FdDcwLJZXv%2BQA%3D","user_id":"110657416481","user_name":"安抚不安分的小情绪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110657416481","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399966464486165529","book_info":{"abstract":"无CP+大女主+女强+微群像+基建+爽文+穿越
云知，一个冷宫中长大的公主。
身在冷宫，不在沉默中爆发,就在沉默中灭亡，为了能更好的活下去，利用一切手段，弑父杀兄坐上了那个人人都想坐的高位。
结果在位没几年，就因病驾崩。
再一次睁眼，她成了天启国一个偏僻小镇，铁匠家刚刚出世的小女儿云栀。
相处几年后，发现这对便宜爹娘和跟班大哥都还不错，准备就这样当个乖女儿过下去也挺好。
谁知道，没几年天下就乱了。
无法，世道逼迫，她只能重操旧业，带着家人连夜出逃，一步步再次称帝。
乱世出英雄，在这乱世中也涌现出了无数杰出的人物，或男或女。
才智过人的丞相柳安若，有勇有谋的大将军陈元淑……
【架空文，误考据】
【不是一开始就是乱世，后面几年才开始乱的】
【女主疯批型人格，上辈子因没人教她，一直都是靠自己摸索，所以冷血，穿越后改善了一点，利己主义，擅长给人洗脑，俗称PUA】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od4e0b61cea2388e85dcace7207270c4e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"秋辞与灯鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7399966464486165529","book_name":"女帝穿越，她在乱世逐鹿天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4057人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7399973867382374937","read_count":"4057","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"645621"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"298","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,无CP,女强,穿越,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/acfe87a4455f90d48c67d8fa0d4d1d47~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254738&x-signature=fxtvxRHygmxgwi9eHAJT64zvcpg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109449017312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211325385E33501FE2A0F602D9EB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4542,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13052},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579671303689274174","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完全符合要求，各方面都很不错
前期争霸精彩，登基称帝后也依旧有新内容[赞]
一直到大结局都很吸引人
可惜有些细节，不够完美(个人比较敏锐

最后就是，可惜番外写拉了，
大结局我都想好怎么大夸特夸了，
结果番外看得我，眼前一黑，又一黑，又一黑

对这那女孩子的描述，太刻板印象了

如果真的是几千年女本位，女男平等的社会，女孩子不缺爱，不缺权力，不缺乏主体性

那就根本不会把情感寄托在别人身上
不会满脑子磕磕磕，不会性缘脑

这方面不如我看的上一本，没有做到女男平等。所以轻轻扣一分"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764784062,"group_id":"7399966464486165529","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz0/BbdohmUxbNfWKuP4hFL0BpIOd5Z3Nk9bZIIa6Sn+","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3525489844297292","user_name":"爱吃荷月酥的尹桃心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3525489844297292","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965332,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399966464486165529","book_info":{"abstract":"无CP+大女主+女强+微群像+基建+爽文+穿越
